name: codex-loop-engineering
description: Artifact-first loop orchestration workflows for substantial Codex projects.

interface.shortDescription: Run disciplined planning, execution, review, and repair loops in Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex Loop Engineering turns long-running Codex work into controlled loops with explicit goal, state, context, act, capture, and stop interfaces. It helps manager and dispatcher lanes coordinate clean-context planning, execution, review, arbitration, repair, and optional Claude cross-checking without turning the project into an unstructured group chat.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Loop Engineering for this project.
Plan a multi-agent Codex loop for this work.
Review this loop artifact and arbitrate findings.
